title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
